subject: Trunks with light-colored hair in a powered-up stance, surrounded by golden ki energy, looking intensely over his shoulder
description: A young male figure with light-colored hair stands in a powered-up pose, ki energy blazing around him in bright gold and yellow tones. He looks back over his shoulder with a fierce, focused expression. His clothing appears dark-colored — jacket or vest. The energy aura is dense and jagged, filling much of the frame. The background is largely washed out in golden light with suggested landscape elements. The posture conveys rapid power escalation — mid-transformation feel rather than a finished super form.
foreground: Light-haired fighter looking over shoulder, dense golden ki aura blazing around him
background: Golden energy wash with suggested landscape
